title: Histotechnician
description: Genentech is seeking a Histotechnician for our Research Triangle Park facility to support cancer and genetic disease research. You'll prepare and analyze tissue samples that advance breakthrough therapies. Work on-site in a cutting-edge research environment.
responsibilities: Prepare tissue specimens for microscopic examination
Operate histology laboratory equipment and instruments
Follow standardized protocols and maintain quality standards
Document specimen information and maintain sample tracking systems
Support immunohistochemistry and special staining procedures
Assist with sample analysis and data collection for research projects

requirements.education: High School diploma or Associate's degree in Histology or Medical Laboratory Technology
skills: Tissue sample preparation and staining techniques
Knowledge of histological procedures and protocols
Laboratory safety and quality control awareness
certifications: ASCP Histotechnician (HT) certification required or within 12 months

benefits: On-site position at Genentech Research Triangle Park
Access to Genentech's research and development resources
